strengths: 17+ years of diverse software engineering experience spanning web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput infrastructure, satisfying the 15-year minimum
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP (Model Context Protocol) tooling at re:cinq, plus a track record of building and shipping open-source platforms
Demonstrated entrepreneurial drive through founding GISCollective, delivering multiple open-source frameworks, and giving public talks — aligns with the intrapreneurial profile the role values
concerns: AI expertise is nascent: all substantive AI/agentic work dates from April 2025 (~2 months), with no recognized AI products, platforms, or publications at scale
No advanced degree in an AI-related field; educational background consists of two bachelor's degrees (Computer Science and Fine Arts/Image Processing)

No evidence of director-level IC scope: the resume shows no strategic customer advisory work, no cross-organizational technical leadership, and no pattern of setting engineering strategy beyond individual team contributions
response.justification: Bogdan is a capable, broadly experienced engineer with genuine entrepreneurial instincts and very recent entry into AI-agent tooling, but the resume does not yet support a director-level individual contributor profile focused on AI strategy. The role explicitly requires recognized AI expertise with demonstrated products or platforms, strategic advisory engagement with customers and partners, and the seniority to inspire and set technical direction across organizations — none of which are evidenced at meaningful scale. His current trajectory is encouraging, but at this moment his profile reads closer to a senior/staff engineer moving toward AI work than to a Principal Engineer hired for AI strategy leadership.
